- CU-001: 0.15 mg/kg at 12.4 kg → 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min. Note: stable; 22% tumor regression at last scan.
- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg at 9.1 kg → 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min. Note: responding well; weight gain improving.
- CU-003: 0.18 mg/kg at 15.7 kg → 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min. Note: new enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27.

On PK model stability: the file shows current dosing parameters and PK clearance values, but it doesn’t include validation/performance logs. So, based on this config alone, I don’t see any obvious red flags in the current entries, but I can’t definitively confirm model stability without the latest QA or validation outputs.

I’ve already saved the dosing summary as a report. If you want, I can also format it into an email once you give me Dr. Martinez’s Nexus address.
